rationale: The candidate 90a35d5c9717082238ecc73d5fcaf158856fe18a provides the most natural and consistent German translation. It correctly translates the subtitle which was missing in the current version and other candidates. It uses a consistent 'du' (informal) address which fits Dan's direct style better than the formal 'Sie' used in the current version. It also handles technical terms like 'Pending-Zustand' and 'Host-Umfeld' accurately while maintaining the MDX structure perfectly.
